calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-03-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff American Express Centurion Bank.
No appearance by defendant Analisa Belli, an individual.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on January 13, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff American Express Centurion Bank, and against defendant Analalisa Belli, an individual as follows:

Principal - $10,636.11.
Interest - $731.41.
Attorney Fees - Reserved.
Costs - $462.00.

Total - $11,829.52.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-03-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-13-2010 Set For Trial On May-03-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
